title: Ghat Road Safety Tips
content: The Ooty ghat road has 36 hairpin bends. Drive slowly especially during monsoon (June-September). Fog is common in early mornings. Avoid night driving.

title: Last Bus Timing
content: Last bus from Kodaikanal to Dindigul leaves at 7:30 PM. After that only private taxis available at higher cost.

title: Budget Stay Options
content: Dharamshala near Ramanathaswamy Temple offers rooms at Rs 200-400 per night. Book in advance during festival season.
